nodes.proof:

- exists ps1; split.

-- exact Hproof1.
- exists ps2; split.

attempts:
refine (for_Imp_E (E.union Gamma Gamma') p q

  (match PROVE2 with ex_intro _ ps2 (conj Hsub2 Hpr2) => ex_intro _ ps2 (conj (fun x Hx => E.In_union_r (Hsub2 x Hx)) Hpr2) end)).

refine (for_Imp_E (E.union Gamma Gamma') p q ?_ ?_).
- refine (let (ps1, Hsub1, Hproof1) := PROVE1 in

- refine (let (ps2, Hsub2, Hproof2) := PROVE2 in
         ex_intro _ ps2 (conj (fun x Hx => E.In_union_r _ _ _ _ (Hsub2 x Hx)) Hproof2)).

destruct PROVE1 as [ps1 [Hsub1 Hproof1]].
destruct PROVE2 as [ps2 [Hsub2 Hproof2]].

- exists ps1; split.

  + exact Hproof1.
- exists ps2; split.
  + intros x Hx. apply E.In_union_r. apply Hsub2. exact Hx.
